sub_modules.dct_input_vector: Combinational block that exposes the stored 8-sample input vector to the transform datapath.
sub_modules.dct_coeff_row_rom: Combinational fixed-point Q14 coefficient ROM for DCT rows and IDCT transpose rows.
sub_modules.dct_mac8: Combinational 8-input signed multiply-accumulate engine for matrix-vector products.
sub_modules.dct_round_saturate: Combinational fixed-point rounding, scaling, and signed output saturation block.
